comparison_surface_note: Reads the official Configuration clientbound keep_alive frame from configuration_keepalive_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl, sends it through a localhost TcpListener to Conn::read_packet() in State::Configuration, maps it to MappedPacket::KeepAliveClientbound(id), calls packet::send_keep_alive with that id, and compares the response bytes to VarInt(official serverbound framed length) plus the official serverbound framed payload from configuration_keepalive_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl.
test_topology_note: This runtime protocol echo manifest is intentionally below oracle/test-manifests/775/runtime because the current jar-backed runner only handles direct jar-regenerated cases and manifests.
